title: better support for wire real bus

features.name: wire real unpacked array port declaration
features.description: Code should include a module port declared as 'input wire real' with an unpacked array dimension, representing a real-number bus

features.name: wire real array variable and continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a 'wire real' unpacked array variable in a module body, assigned via a continuous assign from a real array variable

features.name: dumpvars auto-dump with wire real array in scope
features.description: Code should include a $dumpvars call using module scope when the module contains 'wire real' array variables, testing VCD auto-dump coverage of real bus signals

features.name: module instantiation with real array port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation connecting a 'wire real' unpacked array as an actual argument to a 'wire real' array port

features.name: real array element indexing in arithmetic expression
features.description: Code should include element-wise indexing of a real unpacked array inside an arithmetic expression used in a continuous assignment
